loan.title: Unilateral interest-rate change
keywords: change the interest rate at any time
interest may be changed by the lender
revise the interest rate without notice
loan.check_description: Flag clauses allowing the lender to change interest or charges without a clear formula and adequate notice.
loan.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — verify applicable RBI directions and lender category]
loan.plain_explanation_template: The lender may be able to change the cost of the loan without a clear limit or notice process.

loan.title: Compounding default interest
loan.check_description: Flag default charges that compound or charge interest on accrued interest; applicable requirements depend on the lender and product.
loan.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — verify applicable RBI directions and contract law]
loan.plain_explanation_template: Default charges may compound and make the debt grow disproportionately.

loan.title: Automatic acceleration of the loan
loan.check_description: Flag clauses making the full balance immediately payable for a broad or minor default.
loan.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — depends on loan product, lender, notice, and applicable law]
loan.plain_explanation_template: A single default may make the entire outstanding loan immediately payable.

loan.title: Undefined loan fees
keywords: fees as determined by the lender
loan.check_description: Flag undefined, unilateral, or uncapped fees and cost pass-throughs.
loan.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — verify disclosure rules applicable to the lender and product]
loan.plain_explanation_template: The agreement may allow charges that are not clearly listed, calculated, or capped.

loan.title: Broad recovery authorization
loan.check_description: Flag broad self-help recovery permissions that may bypass notice, proportionality, privacy, or lawful process.
loan.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — verify applicable recovery, privacy, and banking rules]
loan.plain_explanation_template: The lender claims unusually broad recovery powers that need careful review.

employment.title: Termination without notice
keywords: termination at any time without cause
employment.check_description: Flag clauses permitting termination without notice, stated grounds, or applicable process.
employment.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — employment protections depend on role, establishment, and applicable law]
employment.plain_explanation_template: The employer may claim a broad power to end employment without notice or process.

employment.title: Broad post-employment non-compete
keywords: shall not work for any competitor
employment.check_description: Flag broad post-employment work restrictions for review under applicable contract and employment law.
employment.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — assess Indian Contract Act, 1872 Section 27 and the facts]
employment.plain_explanation_template: This clause may broadly restrict where you can work after employment ends.

employment.title: Broad wage deduction
employment.check_description: Flag broad or undefined authority to deduct, withhold, or forfeit earned compensation.
employment.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — wage protections depend on coverage and applicable law]
employment.plain_explanation_template: The employer may claim a broad right to withhold or deduct earned pay.

employment.title: Unpaid additional work
employment.check_description: Flag clauses requiring additional hours without compensation where wage or working-time protections may apply.
employment.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — coverage depends on role, wages, establishment, and applicable law]
employment.plain_explanation_template: The clause may require extra working hours without additional compensation.

employment.title: One-sided employment recovery
keywords: recover all losses from the employee
employment.check_description: Flag clauses imposing broad or unlimited liability on an employee regardless of actual fault or loss.
employment.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — assess contract, wage-deduction, and employment law]
employment.plain_explanation_template: You may be made responsible for losses beyond those you actually caused.

service.title: Total exclusion of provider liability
keywords: service provider shall have no liability
service.check_description: Flag blanket exclusions that attempt to remove all provider responsibility, including protections that may not be waivable.
service.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — assess applicable contract and consumer law]
service.plain_explanation_template: The provider may be trying to avoid responsibility for every kind of loss or failure.

service.title: Unilateral service changes
keywords: change these terms at any time
service.check_description: Flag clauses allowing unilateral changes to material terms, services, or fees without adequate notice or choice.
service.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — assess applicable contract and consumer law]
service.plain_explanation_template: The provider may change important terms or prices without clear notice or your agreement.

service.title: Absolute no-refund term
service.check_description: Flag absolute no-refund clauses that may override remedies available for non-performance or defective service.
service.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — assess applicable consumer and contract law]
service.plain_explanation_template: The clause may deny every refund even when the promised service is not provided.

service.title: Unclear automatic renewal
service.check_description: Flag automatic renewals lacking clear advance notice, cancellation steps, or renewal pricing.
service.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — assess applicable consumer and contract law]
service.plain_explanation_template: The service may renew and charge you again unless you follow unclear cancellation steps.

service.title: Restricted customer remedies
service.check_description: Flag clauses that broadly restrict access to lawful remedies or impose a one-sided dispute process.
service.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — enforceability depends on applicable law and the parties]
service.plain_explanation_template: The agreement may prevent you from using legal remedies when the service fails.

general.title: Waiver of legal remedies
general.check_description: Flag blanket waivers of access to courts, lawful authorities, or legal remedies.
general.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — enforceability depends on document type and applicable law]
general.plain_explanation_template: The clause may prevent you from enforcing your rights through lawful remedies.

general.title: Unlimited one-sided liability
general.check_description: Flag clauses imposing unlimited or one-sided liability without tying it to fault, causation, or a reasonable cap.
general.plain_explanation_template: You may be responsible for unlimited losses, including losses you did not cause.

general.title: Unilateral contract changes
keywords: change the terms at any time
terms may be changed without consent
general.check_description: Flag clauses allowing one party to change material terms without notice, objective limits, or the other party's agreement.
general.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — assess applicable contract and consumer law]
general.plain_explanation_template: The other party may change important contract terms without your agreement.

general.title: Automatic total forfeiture
general.check_description: Flag automatic total forfeiture that may be disproportionate to the actual loss.
general.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — assess applicable contract law and actual-loss principles]
general.plain_explanation_template: You may automatically lose everything paid even if the actual loss is smaller.

general.title: Undefined additional charges
keywords: fees determined from time to time
general.check_description: Flag undefined, unilateral, or uncapped fees and expense pass-throughs.
general.legal_basis: [NEEDS RESEARCH — assess applicable contract and consumer law]
general.plain_explanation_template: The agreement may add costs that are not clearly listed, calculated, or capped.
